name: one_on_one_01

input.subject: 1:1 with Alex - Weekly Sync
input.snippet: Hi, I'd like to set up our weekly 1:1...
input.body_text:
Hi,

I'd like to set up our weekly 1:1 meeting. How about:

When: Every Tuesday, starting February 3rd
Time: 2:00 PM - 2:30 PM
Where: My office (Room 401) or Zoom

Agenda:
- Project updates
- Blockers and support needed
- Career development
- Open discussion

Let me know if this time works for you or suggest an alternative.

Best,
Alex

--
Alex Rivera
Engineering Manager
Company Inc.

notes: 1:1 meeting request - tests extracting first occurrence of recurring meeting
